description_long: This is a single tan leather dress shoe with brogue detailing along the seams and toe cap, featuring decorative perforations and serrated edges. The shoe has a rounded toe and a low-profile, off-white rubber sole with visible stitching around the welt. Cream-colored laces are threaded through five pairs of eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern. The interior lining appears to be a lighter, possibly synthetic or fabric material, and the heel counter shows signs of wear and creasing. The overall finish is matte with some scuff marks and discoloration, indicating regular use. The shoe's design is classic and suitable for urban environments, such as city streets or office settings.
description: A tan leather dress shoe with brogue detailing, cream laces, and a low-profile rubber sole, showing visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brogue detailing, stitching, and the full length of the tan leather upper and off-white sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, cream laces in a criss-cross pattern, and perforated brogue design on the toe cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the brogue pattern, stitching, and the slightly worn heel and sole.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel counter, visible creasing, and the interior lining of the shoe.
